criterion_text: Objective severity trend: PASI, BSA, and/or IGA show a directional change across visits.
reasoning: PASI rose from 6.1 to 14.2 to 16.8 across V1, V3, V4; BSA and IGA moved in the same direction. Objective severity is worsening.

criterion_text: Symptom trajectory, including nail and joint involvement, shows a directional change.

evidence.quote: worse over the past few weeks

reasoning: New nail findings at V3 and patient-reported worsening before V4 indicate a worsening symptom trajectory.

criterion_text: DLQI (Dermatology Life Quality Index) trend shows a directional change.
reasoning: DLQI rose from 7 to 15 to 17, a sustained increase beyond the 4-point threshold.

criterion_text: Treatment-response adequacy: the current regimen has been given an adequate, adherent trial.

evidence.quote: start adalimumab 40 mg subcutaneously every 2 weeks, first dose administered today

reasoning: Two of four scheduled adalimumab doses were missed; the trial is not adequate to judge response.

criterion_text: Worsening cannot be attributed to disease if a confounder (non-adherence, infection, steroid-withdrawal or seasonal flare) is unaddressed.
reasoning: Objective indices worsened despite starting adalimumab; the flare is attributed to disease progression.
